posts.title: Tech House / Bass House / Jackin House / Deep House by DJ Hulk - Mix #178
posts.description:
Turn up the volume and let the rhythm take control.

Dive into an electrifying journey through the underground sound of Tech House. This mix delivers pulsating basslines, hypnotic grooves, and infectious energy that will keep you moving from start to finish.

Featuring the hottest tracks from the scene right now—pure floor-filling fuel for your next session.

🎧 Press play. Close your eyes. Feel the beat.

If you enjoy, please fav, repost, comment!
✨DJ Hulk ✨
tracklist: Martin KUNG, A17N - In The House (Extended Mix)
La Fuente - Higher When I Rise (Extended)
Prospa, Cloonee - Free Your Mind (Extended Mix)
Tommy Veanud - Ready Or Not (Extended Mix)
Vinter - This Is Not The James Brown (Extended Mix)
Ralph Felix feat. Tania Foster - Out Of My Life (Extended Mix)
Rebel Dent - Summer Time Is Here
STBAN, Sandra Carrasco ft. Josemi Carmona - Gitanita (James Hurr Extended Mix)

posts.title: Tech House, Soulful Grooves & Peak-Time Anthems by DJ HULK - MIX #177
posts.description:
Turn up the volume! Mix 177 has arrived, bringing you a seamless blend of cutting-edge House music, heavy-hitting remixes, and soulful vocal gems.

From the driving underground energy of Tita Lau and Jasper Miller to the euphoric, feel-good vibes of John Newman., this set is designed to keep the momentum high from the first beat to the final fade-out. Whether you’re working out, pre-gaming, or just need that daily dose of high-quality House—this one is for you.

If you enjoy, please fav, repost, comment!
✨DJ Hulk ✨
tracklist: Sigala x Leigh-Anne x Jonita Gandhi - Hello (S3VN Remix)
Mike Nasty - To Life (Soul Mix - Dub)
M is for Motion & Debby Holiday - Never Can Say Goodbye (Nick Bertossi Remix)

posts.title: DJ EFUNK B2B DJ Hulk - Stuggi House Connection
posts.description:
This week I present my collaboration with the fabulous DJ EFUNK ( https://www.mixcloud.com/dmantzio/ )!  Having grown up in Stuttgart, Germany, he now lives in Thessaloniki, Greece, where he performs in selected bars and beach clubs. He is strongly influenced by underground US House music and lays a strong focus on selecting only the best and rare underground house tunes!
The title Stuggi House Connection refers to Stuttgart (also called Stuggi Town) - the current place of living of DJ Hulk and the place where DJ Efunk has grown up.

DJ EFUNK starts our B2B. I take over at 00:38:31. 

Special apprearance Skapes - Hit It MiKel CuGGa ReMix ( https://www.mixcloud.com/mikelcugga , 00:41:50 )
